name: Tasq.ai
description: Enterprise human-in-the-loop AI platform for data labeling, collection and production model QA.

seo.title: Tasq.ai — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Tasq.ai: Enterprise human-in-the-loop AI platform for data labeling, collection and production model QA.

when_to_use: Managing and annotating ML training data with collaborative tools
Running AI-assisted annotation on image, video, and text datasets
Tracking annotation quality and labeler performance across projects
Building active learning loops to reduce annotation cost over time

cons: Quality varies by task and geography
review.verdict: A competent labeling-to-evals partner, but not obviously differentiated from the bigger human-in-loop incumbents.
review.best_for: Enterprises needing managed labeling and ongoing model QA with SLAs
review.not_for: Startups that can run tight in-house labeling via cheaper self-serve tools

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales — no explicit peak-lock evidence
